Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 173 

PART_D_LIPS_100 

LABEL: Part D Low Income Premium Subsidy 100% 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the dollar amount of the monthly Part D low-income total premium subsidy (LIPS) for 
beneficiaries at the 100% subsidized level. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: The CCW constructs the plan characteristics file from information
